docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT NELSON, KATRINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $95) SERVED JUN-14-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NELSON, KATRINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NELSON, KATRINA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,695.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITUS TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN. DEFENDANT KATRINA NELSON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2022 - JUDGMENT.
